steps.title: Supplementary angles relationship
steps.content:
At each intersection where the transversal meets a line, adjacent angles are supplementary—they sum to \$180°$. The acute angle is $(9x - 560)°$, so the adjacent obtuse angle is:
$$180 - (9x - 560) = 740 - 9x \text{ degrees}$$

steps.title: Sum one acute angle and three obtuse angles
